instruction: Using Terminal, write the number of lines in ~/data/{SRC} to ~/{OUT}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §9 slice 4); Tier-A exec derived gold

args: rm -rf "$HOME/data" "$HOME/{OUT}"; mkdir -p "$HOME/data"; n=$(printf '%s' {SRC} | tr -dc 'a-z'); case {SRC} in three.txt) seq 3;; five.txt) seq 5;; seven.txt) seq 7;; esac > "$HOME/data/{SRC}"
